title: Next.js Core Contributions
description: Contributed to Next.js open source framework by fixing critical routing issues in the App Router and expanding documentation, which benefited over 100,000 developers globally.

title: Habit Tracker MVP
description: Built a robust Habit Tracker using Node.js and MongoDB, which improved data retrieval speeds by 30% by implementing a refactored MVC backend architecture.

title: QSR Dashboard Suite
description: Developed a multi-page operational dashboard for Quick Service Restaurants using Next.js, which reduced inventory tracking time by 40% and streamlined daily staff tasks.

title: AdhyaLakshmi Platform
description: Engineered a premium showcase website using React and GSAP, which increased user engagement duration by 25% through dynamic infinite scrolling carousels.

title: Pinecone AI Wrappers
description: Published an open source utility wrapper for Pinecone Vector DB, abstracting redundant API calls into a clean TypeScript SDK used by multiple Headstarter Fellows.
